sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ أُمُّ جَاسِرٍ شِرَاءَ أَثَاثٍ جَدِيدٍ لِلْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Jasirova majka je htjela kupiti novi namještaj za kuću.
sentences.translationEn: Jasir's mother wanted to buy new furniture for the house.

sentences.arabic: قَارَنَتِ الأَسْعَارَ فِي أَكْثَرَ مِنْ مَحَلٍّ.
sentences.translation: Uspoređivala je cijene u više od jedne prodavnice.
sentences.translationEn: She compared prices in more than one shop.

sentences.translation: Pronašla je lijep namještaj po odgovarajućoj cijeni.
sentences.translationEn: She found beautiful furniture at a reasonable price.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعَتِ المَبْلَغَ وَطَلَبَتِ التَّوْصِيلَ إِلَى البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Platila je iznos i zatražila dostavu kući.
sentences.translationEn: She paid the amount and asked for delivery to the house.

sentences.translation: Bila je sretna zbog svog dobrog izbora.
sentences.translationEn: She was happy with her good choice.
